title: RE: California Public Records Act (CPRA) Request – Access Logs and Email Integrity Records (Office Of The President (ucop), University Of California)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Dear Public Records Officer,

Pursuant to my rights under the California Public Records Act (Government Code § 7920.000 et seq.), I am writing to request an inspection and copies of the following public records held by the University of California, Berkeley pertaining to my student email account (jung_young_jin@berkeley.edu):

Administrative Access & Audit Logs: All logs, metadata, and audit trails showing any access, modification, or deletion of emails within the aforementioned account by any system administrator, IT staff, or authorized personnel from January 1, 2022, to April 15, 2026.

Account Activity Records: Comprehensive login history and IP address logs for the period of January 1, 2022, to April 15, 2026, specifically focused on identifying any sessions not initiated by the primary user.

Communication Integrity Reports: Any technical logs or internal correspondence explaining the absence of communication records prior to October 2, 2023, within this account.

If any portion of these records is exempt from disclosure by law, please provide the remaining non-exempt portions and cite the specific legal justification for each redaction. I request that these records be provided in an electronic format.

I look forward to your response within 10 days, as required by the Act.

Sincerely,

Young Jin Jung
Student ID: 3036184384
Email: jung_young_jin@berkeley.edu

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Young Jin Jung
